rawAssistant: Fresh signs on the north road reveal a faint trail of charred leaves and snapped twigs, as if something had been recently passing through the area. The air is heavy with the scent of smoke and damp earth. It's not clear what might have caused this disturbance, but it seems worth investigating further.
